engineIntelligence.h2: MG MG5 Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the MG MG5 in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: MG MG5 15S4C engine - petrol 1.5L replacement UK
productionHistory: MG5 SE Connect, Excite, Core, Trophy, Exclusive - 2012-2016
knownFailures: Timing chain wear - tensioner failure causes rattle on cold start, typically 60k-90k miles.
Oil consumption - piston ring wear leads to excessive oil use on higher-mileage units.
Water pump failure - overheating risk if pump seals degrade in stop-start conditions.

cards.altText: MG MG5 PMSM engine - electric 52.5kWh replacement UK
productionHistory: MG5 EV SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive, Core - 2020-2024
knownFailures: Motor bearing noise - high-mileage wear causes whining from motor housing, typically 80k+ miles.
Inverter fault warnings - power electronics failure triggers dashboard warning lights.
Cooling system leaks - thermal management circuit failures risk motor overheating.

cards.altText: MG MG5 PMSM engine - electric 64kWh replacement UK
productionHistory: MG5 EV Long Range SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive - 2020-present
knownFailures: Battery-motor compatibility issues - mismatched components cause reduced performance warnings.
Reduction gear noise - single-speed transmission wear on high-mileage commercial use.
Regenerative braking integration faults - motor-controller communication errors affect efficiency.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt motor: £2,850-£5,400 (supply only) Estimated from comparable PMSM units - actual quotes may vary.

engineGuide.h2: MG MG5 Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol
entries.history: Import-only VTi-Tech unit, reliable naturally aspirated design but timing chain wear drives UK replacement demand.
compatibleVariants: Core, Excite, SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive, Exclusive Nav
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - rattle on cold start, typically 60k-90k miles

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol

commonFailures: Oil consumption - early piston ring design prone to wear
Timing chain stretch - tensioner upgrade recommended at 70k miles

entries.title: 1.5L Petrol

commonProblems.h2: MG MG5 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The MG MG5's engine reliability varies significantly between its import petrol 1.5L VTi-Tech (15S4C) and EV permanent magnet motor powertrains. Timing chain wear dominates petrol replacement enquiries, while EV owners report inverter and bearing issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: MG MG5 Timing Chain Failure - Why 15S4C Petrol Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: MG MG5 Core, Excite, SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive (2012-2016, 15S4C family)
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioner wear allows chain slack, causing rattle on cold start and potential valve timing loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides before catastrophic failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early; prevents engine damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded timing components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for engines with existing damage or high mileage

problems.recommendation: If you hear cold-start rattle but the engine still runs smoothly, a preventative chain kit from a specialist offers better value. Once rattling is severe or performance drops, replacement with a rebuilt 15S4C unit including upgraded tensioner is the reliable long-term solution.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 15S4C engine prices for your MG MG5

problems.h4: MG MG5 Oil Consumption - Piston Ring Wear on High-Mileage 15S4C Units
problems.affectedModels: MG MG5 Core, Excite, SE Connect (2012-2014, 15S4C-A variant)
problems.rootCause: Early-production piston ring design allows oil to bypass into combustion chamber, increasing consumption.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace piston rings, reassemble with updated specs
repairOptions.longevity: Costly labour; only viable if block is otherwise sound

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with revised piston rings, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Better value for engines over 80k miles or with additional wear

problems.recommendation: For MG5 owners noticing blue smoke or frequent top-ups, a rebuilt 15S4C with revised piston rings offers peace of mind and avoids repeated repair bills. The labour cost of ring replacement often approaches rebuild pricing.
problems.cta: Get quotes for MG MG5 15S4C rebuilt engine with piston ring upgrade

problems.group: MG MG5 EV Motor Bearing Noise
problems.h4: MG MG5 EV Motor Bearing Noise - High-Mileage Wear on PMSM Units
problems.affectedModels: MG MG5 EV Standard Range, Long Range (2020-present, PMSM motor)
problems.rootCause: Motor bearing seals degrade over time, allowing contamination and wear that causes whining noise from motor housing.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove motor, replace bearings and seals, reassemble with specialist tools
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if motor windings and inverter are confirmed healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt motor with upgraded bearings, verified inverter compatibility, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for high-mileage EVs or when inverter faults coexist

problems.recommendation: If bearing noise is the only symptom and diagnostics confirm healthy windings, bearing replacement offers good value. For EVs with additional inverter warnings or battery integration issues, a complete rebuilt PMSM package ensures system compatibility.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt PMSM motor prices for your MG MG5 EV

problems.group: MG MG5 EV Inverter Fault Warnings
problems.h4: MG MG5 EV Inverter Fault Warnings - Power Electronics Failure
problems.affectedModels: MG MG5 EV all variants (2020-present, PMSM motor with integrated inverter)
problems.typicalFailureMileage: Variable; can occur at any mileage due to electrical fault
problems.rootCause: Inverter control module or power transistor failure triggers dashboard warning and may disable motor operation.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnose fault, repair or replace inverter module, reprogram control software
repairOptions.longevity: Costly; only viable if motor windings are confirmed healthy

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt PMSM + Inverter Package
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt motor with verified inverter, compatibility testing, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when motor and inverter faults coexist or for high-mileage EVs

problems.recommendation: Inverter faults require specialist diagnostics. If the motor shows additional symptoms (noise, reduced power), a complete rebuilt PMSM package with verified inverter compatibility offers better long-term reliability than component-only repair.
problems.cta: Get quotes for MG MG5 EV motor and inverter replacement package

problems.group: MG MG5 EV Cooling System Failure
problems.h4: MG MG5 EV Cooling System Failure - Thermal Management Risks
problems.affectedModels: MG MG5 EV all variants (2020-present, PMSM motor cooling circuit)
problems.rootCause: Coolant hose seals or pump failures allow leaks into motor housing, risking overheating and electrical damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace hoses, seals, coolant pump; pressure test system
repairOptions.longevity: Preventative; viable if no motor damage has occurred

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt PMSM with Cooling Upgrade
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt motor with verified cooling circuit compatibility, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Required if overheating has caused motor winding or bearing damage

problems.recommendation: Address cooling leaks immediately to prevent catastrophic motor damage. If overheating warnings have occurred, a rebuilt PMSM with verified thermal management compatibility is the reliable solution.
problems.cta: Compare MG MG5 EV motor replacement with cooling system upgrade

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your MG MG5
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you own an import petrol MG5 or a modern EV estate, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK MG MG5 specialists. Every rebuilt engine or motor includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices now and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare MG MG5 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific MG MG5 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

Common for 15S4C petrol and PMSM EV motor applications
Supply-only or supply & fit available nationwide

items.title: MG MG5 1.5L Petrol Engines

items.title: MG MG5 Electric Motors
items.description: The MG5 EV uses a permanent magnet synchronous motor (PMSM) paired with either a 52.5kWh Standard Range or 64kWh Long Range battery. Replacement focuses on motor, inverter and thermal management compatibility rather than displacement.

engineYears.h2: MG MG5 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the MG MG5's UK production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The MG5 arrived in the UK exclusively as an import petrol estate with the 1.5L VTi-Tech engine, establishing the 15S4C family that dominates replacement enquiries today.
keyChanges: MG5 launched in UK as grey import petrol estate only
1.5L VTi-Tech (15S4C) engine fitted across all trims
Manual and automatic transmission options available
mainEngines: 15S4C - 1.5L petrol (Core, Excite, SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive)
knownFor: Reliable naturally aspirated design when maintained
Timing chain tensioner wear emerges as key failure point
High UK replacement demand on SE Connect and Trophy trims
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2016 MG MG5 replacement engines
years.ticker: MG5 15S4C engine replacement • MG5 timing chain fix UK • MG5 petrol engine supply and fit
enquiries: MG5 petrol engine supply and fit

years.description: The MG5 EV arrived as a practical electric estate with permanent magnet synchronous motor, creating a new replacement market focused on motor, inverter and battery compatibility.
keyChanges: MG5 EV launched with 52.5kWh Standard Range and 64kWh Long Range options
PMSM permanent magnet motor fitted across all EV trims
Single-speed reduction gear and integrated inverter architecture
mainEngines: PMSM - electric motor (EV Core, SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive, Long Range)
knownFor: Strong real-world range and practical estate packaging
Motor bearing wear emerges on high-mileage commercial examples
Inverter fault warnings require specialist diagnostics
years.cta: Get quotes for 2020-2023 MG MG5 EV motor replacement
years.ticker: MG5 EV motor replacement • MG5 PMSM bearing noise fix • MG5 EV inverter fault UK

years.description: The 2024 MG5 EV facelift introduced updated motor calibration and software, requiring specialist compatibility verification for replacement powertrains.
keyChanges: MG5 EV facelift launched with updated motor control software
PMSM motor hardware retained but calibration refined
Enhanced thermal management and regenerative braking integration
mainEngines: PMSM - electric motor (EV Facelift SE Connect, Trophy, Exclusive, Long Range)
knownFor: Improved efficiency and refinement over pre-facelift models
Replacement units require software compatibility verification
Specialist network essential for facelift EV powertrain work
years.cta: Enquire about MG MG5 EV Facelift 2024 motor replacement

faq.h2: MG MG5 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does an MG MG5 engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: MG MG5 engine replacement costs vary by fuel type and condition. Rebuilt petrol 15S4C engines typically range £1,850-£3,200 supply-only, while rebuilt EV PMSM motors range £2,450-£5,400. Supply & fit adds £450-£850 labour depending on location and specialist.
keyPoints: Petrol 15S4C rebuilt: £1,850-£3,200 supply only
EV PMSM rebuilt: £2,450-£5,400 supply only
Supply & fit labour typically adds £450-£850
Prices include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Get a personalised MG MG5 engine quote in 60 seconds

items.question: What is the most common MG MG5 engine code?
items.answer: The 15S4C is the only combustion engine code fitted to UK-import MG5 petrol models (2012-2016). MG5 EV models use the PMSM permanent magnet synchronous motor - verify your powertrain type on the identification plate or via DVLA registration check.
keyPoints: 15S4C: sole petrol engine code for import MG5 models
PMSM: electric motor code for all MG5 EV variants
Engine code plate location: petrol on block, EV on motor housing
DVLA registration check instantly confirms your exact powertrain
items.cta: Check your MG MG5 engine code compatibility free

items.question: Will a reconditioned MG MG5 engine fit my car?
items.answer: All reconditioned MG MG5 engines and motors supplied through EngineMarket are verified against your powertrain code before dispatch. If compatibility issues arise, we cover return costs and source the correct unit.
keyPoints: Every unit verified against your engine code or VIN
Free compatibility check included with all quotes
Return costs covered if unit doesn't fit as specified
12-month warranty included on all reconditioned units
items.cta: Compare reconditioned MG MG5 engine prices with compatibility guarantee

items.question: How long does an MG MG5 engine replacement take?
items.answer: Most MG MG5 petrol engine replacements are completed within 72 hours of order confirmation. EV motor quotes are typically provided within 24 hours, with supply & fit arranged through our certified specialist network near you.
keyPoints: Petrol engine supply: typically 3-5 working days
EV motor supply: typically 5-7 working days
Supply & fit turnaround: 2-4 days depending on specialist availability
Express options available for urgent commercial requirements
items.cta: Find MG MG5 engine supply & fit specialists near you

items.question: What warranty comes with a reconditioned MG MG5 engine?
items.answer: All reconditioned MG MG5 engines and motors supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty as standard. Extended warranty options up to 24 months are available through select specialists.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Extended 24-month options available via select network specialists
Warranty documentation provided with every order
items.cta: Compare MG MG5 engine warranty terms side-by-side

items.question: Can I replace my MG MG5 petrol engine with an EV motor?
items.answer: MG MG5 petrol to EV conversion requires extensive engineering, battery integration and DVLA reclassification. Contact our specialist network for feasibility assessment and quote - this is not a standard replacement service.
keyPoints: Petrol-to-EV conversion requires full powertrain re-engineering
Battery pack, inverter and control systems must be integrated
DVLA reclassification and insurance notification required
Specialist assessment essential before proceeding
items.cta: Speak to an MG MG5 powertrain conversion specialist

items.question: Is a used MG MG5 engine better value than reconditioned?
items.answer: Used MG MG5 engines save £200-£600 upfront but carry higher risk and typically shorter warranties. Reconditioned units include critical upgrades addressing known failure points and 12-month unlimited mileage warranty for long-term reliability.
keyPoints: Used engines: lower cost but variable condition and warranty
Reconditioned: upgraded components, tested, 12-month warranty
Reconditioned typically offers better value per mile of expected life
Always verify mileage, history and warranty terms before purchase
items.cta: Compare used vs reconditioned MG MG5 engine value

items.question: How do I find my MG MG5 engine code or motor type?
items.answer: Your MG MG5 petrol engine code is stamped on the engine block near the oil filter housing. EV motor type is on the motor housing identification plate near cooling ports. Enter your VIN or registration for instant decoding.
keyPoints: Petrol 15S4C code: engine block near oil filter housing
EV PMSM code: motor housing identification plate
VIN decoder instantly confirms powertrain type and compatibility
Photo guides available in our compatibility help section
items.cta: Use our free MG MG5 engine code lookup tool

items.question: Will an MG MG5 engine replacement affect my insurance?
items.answer: Notify your insurer of your MG MG5 engine or EV motor replacement. Reconditioned units maintain original powertrain specification, so premium impact is typically minimal - always confirm with your provider before work begins.
keyPoints: Insurers must be notified of powertrain replacement
Reconditioned units maintain original specification
Premium impact typically minimal for like-for-like replacement
Keep warranty and invoice documentation for claims
items.cta: Get MG MG5 engine replacement quotes with insurance documentation

items.question: Can I finance my MG MG5 engine replacement?
items.answer: Yes - spread the cost of your MG MG5 engine or motor replacement with 0% APR payment plans subject to status. Apply at checkout or speak to our specialist team for finance options tailored to your budget.
keyPoints: 0% APR payment plans available subject to credit check
Flexible terms: 3, 6 or 12-month options
Apply instantly during quote process
Specialist team available to discuss affordability options
items.cta: Check MG MG5 engine replacement finance options
